# Delta migration handoff
Contact: Priya Shah
Decision: Defer migration
Load test p95 latency was 840 ms, above the 500 ms threshold.
Retest after index remediation before rescheduling.

# Delta migration handoff
Contact: Priya Shah
Decision: Proceed with migration.
The rollout is ready.
